creator: lconrad@restorehc.com
text:
FreeBSD 10 Beta3 does the same on a fresh install on ZFS root striped over two SAS, encrypted, all defaults. When I make installkernel (GENERIC), I get a similar error:

 kernel-install ---
mkdir -p /boot/kernel
mkdir: /boot: Not a directory
*** [kernel-install] Error code 1


--
Liam Conrad
IT Assistant
Restore Health
608.833.7046 ext. 720
